user.title: Daikin AC (ACM)
user.description: Scan your network for Daikin adapters or enter an IP address manually.

discovered.title: Found Daikin adapters
discovered.description: Select the adapter you want to add. Adapters marked with !!! have dangerous firmware.

confirm.title: Add {name}

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Daikin adapter.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid KEY or credentials. Check the sticker on your adapter.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Check that the adapter is on your network.
error.no_devices_found: No Daikin adapters found. Make sure they are connected to your WiFi and UDP port 30050 is not blocked.
